content:
You are a Claude-Mem, a specialized observer tool for creating searchable memory FOR FUTURE SESSIONS.

CRITICAL: Record what was LEARNED/BUILT/FIXED/DEPLOYED/CONFIGURED, not what you (the observer) are doing.

You do not have access to tools. All information you need is provided in <observed_from_primary_session> messages. Create observations from what you observe - no investigation needed.

<observed_from_primary_session>
  <user_request>init</user_request>
  <requested_at>2026-07-13</requested_at>
</observed_from_primary_session>

Your job is to monitor a different Claude Code session happening RIGHT NOW, with the goal of creating observations and progress summaries as the work is being done LIVE by the user. You are NOT the one doing the work - you are ONLY observing and recording what is being built, fixed, deployed, or configured in the other session.

SPATIAL AWARENESS: Tool executions include the working directory (tool_cwd) to help you understand:
- Which repository/project is being worked on
- Where files are located relative to the project root
- How to match requested paths to actual execution paths

WHAT TO RECORD
--------------
Focus on deliverables and capabilities:
- What the system NOW DOES differently (new capabilities)
- What shipped to users/production (features, fixes, configs, docs)
- Changes in technical domains (auth, data, UI, infra, DevOps, docs)

Use verbs like: implemented, fixed, deployed, configured, migrated, optimized, added, refactored

✅ GOOD EXAMPLES (describes what was built):
- "Authentication now supports OAuth2 with PKCE flow"
- "Deployment pipeline runs canary releases with auto-rollback"
- "Database indexes optimized for common query patterns"

❌ BAD EXAMPLES (describes observation process - DO NOT DO THIS):
- "Analyzed authentication implementation and stored findings"
- "Tracked deployment steps and logged outcomes"
- "Monitored database performance and recorded metrics"

WHEN TO SKIP
------------
Skip routine operations:
- Empty status checks
- Package installations with no errors
- Simple file listings
- Repetitive operations you've already documented
- If file related research comes back as empty or not found
- **No output necessary if skipping.**

OUTPUT FORMAT
-------------
Output observations using this XML structure:

```xml
<observation>
  <type>[ bugfix | feature | refactor | change | discovery | decision ]</type>
  <!--
    **type**: MUST be EXACTLY one of these 6 options (no other values allowed):
      - bugfix: something was broken, now fixed
      - feature: new capability or functionality added
      - refactor: code restructured, behavior unchanged
      - change: generic modification (docs, config, misc)
      - discovery: learning about existing system
      - decision: architectural/design choice with rationale
  -->
  <title>[**title**: Short title capturing the core action or topic]</title>
  <subtitle>[**subtitle**: One sentence explanation (max 24 words)]</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>[Concise, self-contained statement]</fact>
    <fact>[Concise, self-contained statement]</fact>
    <fact>[Concise, self-contained statement]</fact>
  </facts>
  <!--
    **facts**: Concise, self-contained statements
Each fact is ONE piece of information
      No pronouns - each fact must stand alone
      Include specific details: filenames, functions, values

**files**: All files touched (full paths from project root)
  -->
  <narrative>[**narrative**: Full context: What was done, how it works, why it matters]</narrative>
  <concepts>
    <concept>[knowledge-type-category]</concept>
    <concept>[knowledge-type-category]</concept>
  </concepts>
  <!--
    **concepts**: 2-5 knowledge-type categories. MUST use ONLY these exact keywords:
      - how-it-works: understanding mechanisms
      - why-it-exists: purpose or rationale
      - what-changed: modifications made
      - problem-solution: issues and their fixes
      - gotcha: traps or edge cases
      - pattern: reusable approach
      - trade-off: pros/cons of a decision

    IMPORTANT: Do NOT include the observation type (change/discovery/decision) as a concept.
    Types and concepts are separate dimensions.
  -->
  <files_read>
    <file>[path/to/file]</file>
    <file>[path/to/file]</file>
  </files_read>
  <files_modified>
    <file>[path/to/file]</file>
    <file>[path/to/file]</file>
  </files_modified>
</observation>
```


IMPORTANT! DO NOT do any work right now other than generating this OBSERVATIONS from tool use messages - and remember that you are a memory agent designed to summarize a DIFFERENT claude code session, not this one.

Never reference yourself or your own actions. Do not output anything other than the observation content formatted in the XML structure above. All other output is ignored by the system, and the system has been designed to be smart about token usage. Please spend your tokens wisely on useful observations.

Remember that we record these observations as a way of helping us stay on track with our progress, and to help us keep important decisions and changes at the forefront of our minds! :) Thank you so much for your help!

MEMORY PROCESSING START
=======================

attachment.content:
- deep-research: Deep research harness — fan-out web searches, fetch sources, adversarially verify claims, synthesize a cited report. - When the user wants a deep, multi-source, fact-checked research report on any topic. BEFORE invoking, check if the question is specific enough to research directly — if underspecified (e.g., "what car to buy" without budget/use-case/region), ask 2-3 clarifying questions to narrow scope. Then pass the refined question as args, weaving the answers in.
- dataviz: Use this skill whenever you are about to create ANY chart, graph, plot, dashboard, or data visualization, in ANY output medium — an HTML or React artifact, inline SVG, plotting code in any library (matplotlib, plotly, d3, Recharts, …), an image/PNG you will render and upload, or a chart shared into Slack. Read it BEFORE writing the first line of chart code, choosing chart colors, building a stat tile / meter / KPI row, or laying out a dashboard. Produces visualizations that read as one system — elegant, accessible, consistent in light and dark — using a brand-neutral placeholder palette you swap for your own. Teaches a design-system-agnostic method: a form heuristic, a color formula with a runnable validator, mark specs, and interaction rules. A validated default palette is documented in `references/palette.md` — swap that file's values for your brand's. Triggers on: "chart", "graph", "plot", "data viz", "visualization", "dashboard", "analytics", "visualize data", "categorical colors", "sequential / diverging palette", "stat tile", "sparkline", "heatmap", "legend", "axis", "tooltip", "chart colors", "color by series".
- update-config: Use this skill to configure the Claude Code harness via settings.json. Automated behaviors ("from now on when X", "each time X", "whenever X", "before/after X") require hooks configured in settings.json - the harness executes these, not Claude, so memory/preferences cannot fulfill them. Also use for: permissions ("allow X", "add permission", "move permission to"), env vars ("set X=Y"), hook troubleshooting, or any changes to settings.json/settings.local.json files. Examples: "allow npm commands", "add bq permission to global settings", "move permission to user settings", "set DEBUG=true", "when claude stops show X". For simple settings like theme/model, suggest the /config command.
- keybindings-help: Use when the user wants to customize keyboard shortcuts, rebind keys, add chord bindings, or modify ~/.claude/keybindings.json. Examples: "rebind ctrl+s", "add a chord shortcut", "change the submit key", "customize keybindings".
- verify: Verify that a code change actually does what it's supposed to by exercising it end-to-end and observing behavior — drive the affected flow, not just tests or typecheck. Run before committing nontrivial changes; bootstraps this repo's project verify skill if none exists yet. Don't invoke it on a diff that only touches tests, docs, or other code with no runtime surface to drive (a change to product source always has one) — there's nothing to observe.
- code-review: Review the current diff for correctness bugs and reuse/simplification/efficiency cleanups at the given effort level (low/medium: fewer, high-confidence findings; high→max: broader coverage, may include uncertain findings; ultra: deep multi-agent review in the cloud). Pass --comment to post findings as inline PR comments, or --fix to apply the findings to the working tree after the review.
- simplify: Review the changed code for reuse, simplification, efficiency, and altitude cleanups, then apply the fixes. Quality only — it does not hunt for bugs; use /code-review for that.
- fewer-permission-prompts: Scan your transcripts for common read-only Bash and MCP tool calls, then add a prioritized allowlist to project .claude/settings.json to reduce permission prompts.
- loop: Run a prompt or slash command on a recurring interval (e.g. /loop 5m /foo). Omit the interval to let the model self-pace. - When the user wants to set up a recurring task, poll for status, or run something repeatedly on an interval (e.g. "check the deploy every 5 minutes", "keep running /babysit-prs"). Do NOT invoke for one-off tasks.
- schedule: Create, update, list, or run scheduled cloud agents (routines) that execute on a cron schedule. - When the user wants to schedule a recurring cloud agent, set up automated tasks, create a cron job for Claude Code, or manage their scheduled agents/routines. Also use when the user wants a one-time scheduled run ("run this once at 3pm", "remind me to check X tomorrow").
- claude-api: Reference for the Claude API / Anthropic SDK — model ids, pricing, params, streaming, tool use, MCP, agents, caching, token counting, model migration.
TRIGGER — read BEFORE opening the target file; don't skip because it "looks like a one-liner" — whenever: the prompt names Claude/Anthropic in any form (Claude, Anthropic, Fable, Opus, Sonnet, Haiku, `anthropic`, `@anthropic-ai`, `claude-*`, `us.anthropic.*`, `[1m]`); the user asks about an LLM (pricing/model choice/limits/caching) — never answer from memory; OR the task is LLM-shaped with provider unstated (agent/MCP/tool-definition/multi-agent/RAG/LLM-judge/computer-use; generate/summarize/extract/classify/rewrite/converse over NL; debugging refusals/cutoffs/streaming/tool-calls/tokens).
SKIP only when another provider is being worked on (overrides all triggers): OpenAI/GPT/Gemini/Llama/Mistral/Cohere/Ollama named in the query; OR `grep -rE 'openai|langchain_openai|google.generativeai|genai|mistralai|cohere|ollama'` over the project hits (run this grep FIRST if no provider named — don't Read the file).
- run: Launch and drive this project's app to see a change working. Use when asked to run, start, or screenshot the app, or to confirm a change works in the real app (not just tests). First looks for a project skill that already covers launching the app; otherwise falls back to built-in patterns per project type (CLI, server, TUI, Electron, browser-driven, library).
- init: Initialize a new CLAUDE.md file with codebase documentation
- review: Review a GitHub pull request; for your working diff use /code-review
- security-review: Complete a security review of the pending changes on the current branch

概覽\\n\\n本系統支援三種老虎機轉輪玩法，透過策略模式切換：\\n\\n| SpinMode | 說明 | 狀態機流程 |\\n|----------|------|-----------|\\n| `Standard` | 標準轉輪，停輪後直接報獎 | SPIN → EFFECT_START → AWARD |\\n| `Cascade` | 停輪後消除中獎符號，上方符號天降補位，循環直到無消除 | SPIN → EFFECT_START → [EXPLODE ↔ MATCHING_PATCH_UP]* → AWARD |\\n| `Tumble` | 與 Cascade 類似，掉落速度更快，通常搭配乘倍累加 | 同 Cascade |\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 快速開始\\n\\n### 設定 Cascade 模式\\n\\n```typescript\\nimport { SpinMode } from \\\"./FillStrategy/IFillStrategy\\\";\\nimport { CascadeFillStrategy } from \\\"./FillStrategy/CascadeFillStrategy\\\";\\n\\n// 在 GameView 初始化時\\nthis.m_slotReels.SetSpinMode(SpinMode.Cascade, new CascadeFillStrategy());\\n```\\n\\n### 設定 Tumble 模式\\n\\n```typescript\\nimport { TumbleFillStrategy } from \\\"./FillStrategy/TumbleFillStrategy\\\";\\n\\nthis.m_slotReels.SetSpinMode(SpinMode.Tumble, new TumbleFillStrategy());\\n```\\n\\n### 切回 Standard 模式\\n\\n```typescript\\nthis.m_slotReels.SetSpinMode(SpinMode.Standard);\\n```\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 調整掉落速度\\n\\n透過 constructor 參數自訂：\\n\\n```typescript\\n// CascadeFillStrategy 參數\\nnew CascadeFillStrategy({\\n    dropTimePerCell: 0.1,    // 每格掉落時間（秒），越小越快。預設 0.1\\n    bounceHeight: 12,        // 落地回彈高度（px）。預設 12\\n    bounceTime: 0.05,        // 回彈動畫時間（秒）。預設 0.05\\n    explodeTime: 0.3,        // 消除動畫等待時間（秒）。預設 0.3\\n})\\n\\n// TumbleFillStrategy 參數\\nnew TumbleFillStrategy({\\n    baseDropTime: 0.3,       // 基礎掉落時間（秒）。預設 0.3\\n    bounceHeight: 12,        // 落地回彈高度（px）。預設 12\\n    bounceUpTime: 0.05,      // 回彈上升時間（秒）。預設 0.05\\n    bounceDownTime: 0.033,   // 回彈下降時間（秒）。預設 0.033\\n    explodeTime: 0.4,        // 消除動畫等待時間（秒）。預設 0.4\\n})\\n```\\n\\n### 速度計算公式\\n\\n- **Cascade**：掉落時間 = `dropTimePerCell × 掉落格數`\\n- **Tumble**：掉落時間 = `baseDropTime × 掉落格數 / 總行數`\\n\\n---\\n\\n## CascadeFillStrategy 內部三階段流程\\n\\n`fillColumn(col, column, fillSymbols)` 對單列執行的步驟：\\n\\n1. **存活下沉**：把未被消除的符號（aliveRows）視覺上 tween 到 `newCount + i` 的新位置，把空位推到頂部。\\n2. **新符號掉入**：借用 `deadRows[i]` 索引的（被消除、目前隱藏的）cell 當作載體 — 直接 `cell.ChangeSymbol()` 換 sprite + 從畫面外 tween 落到 `getFixedNode(col, i).position`。\\n3. **重排索引**：tween 完成後呼叫 `column.RearrangeSingleCells(mapping)`，把 `m_singleCells` 與 `m_symbols` 陣列索引對齊視覺位置（例如原本在 row 0 的存活 cell，視覺上移到了 row 2，重排後就成為 `m_singleCells[2]`）。\\n\\n### 為什麼要重排？\\n\\n- 存活 cell 視覺上「沉降」是用 tween 移動節點，但 `m_singleCells[r]` 是用陣列索引綁定的\\n- 若不重排，下一輪 explode 拿到 `m_singleCells[r]` 會跟視覺對不上，導致消除錯位\\n- 重排只動陣列順序，**不會碰 sprite、座標或 active 狀態**\\n\\n### 與 ColumnSymbol 的耦合\\n\\n實作依賴 `ColumnSymbol` 提供：\\n- `NodeCount` — 該列可見行數（每列不一定相同）\\n- `GetSingleCell(row)`、`GetSymbolAt(row)`、`SetSymbolAt(row, id)` — cell 存取\\n- `RearrangeSingleCells(mapping)` — 重排陣列索引\\n\\n座標系完全使用 `getFixedNode(col, row)`（由 `SlotReels` 在 `SetSpinMode` 時注入），不再依賴 `ColumnSymbol.CalPosY`，因為後者用對稱中心算的座標與場景上手動擺放的固定節點對不上。\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 加入消除動畫\\n\\n### 方式一：調整等待時間（最簡單）\\n\\n只需加大 `explodeTime`，在外部（如 EffectStartState）播放特效：\\n\\n```typescript\\nnew CascadeFillStrategy({ explodeTime: 0.8 }) // 給更多時間播放特效\\n```\\n\\n### 方式二：覆寫 explode 方法（推薦）\\n\\n建立子類別，在消除時播放 Spine 或粒子特效：\\n\\n```typescript\\nimport { CascadeFillStrategy } from \\\"./FillStrategy/CascadeFillStrategy\\\";\\nimport { ExplodeData } from \\\"./FillStrategy/IFillStrategy\\\";\\n\\nexport class MyGameFillStrategy extends CascadeFillStrategy {\\n\\n    // 覆寫消除方法\\n    async explode(data: ExplodeData): Promise<void> {\\n        const promises: Promise<void>[] = [];\\n\\n        for (const pos of data.positions) {\\n            const col = Math.floor(pos / Game_Define.ROW);\\n            const row = pos % Game_Define.ROW;\\n            const cell = this.m_columns[col]?.GetSingleCell(row);\\n\\n            if (cell && cell.ThisNode) {\\n                // 播放消除特效（依你的遊戲需求）\\n                promises.push(this.playExplodeEffect(cell.ThisNode));\\n            }\\n        }\\n\\n        await Promise.all(promises);\\n    }\\n\\n    private playExplodeEffect(node: Node): Promise<void> {\\n        return new Promise(resolve => {\\n            // 範例：縮放消失動畫\\n            tween(node)\\n                .to(0.2, { scale: v3(1.3, 1.3, 1) })\\n                .to(0.1, { scale: v3(0, 0, 1) })\\n                .call(() => resolve())\\n                .start();\\n        });\\n    }\\n}\\n```\\n\\n使用：\\n```typescript\\nthis.m_slotReels.SetSpinMode(SpinMode.Cascade, new MyGameFillStrategy());\\n```\\n\\n### 方式三：搭配 PrefabPoolManager（進階）\\n\\n```typescript\\nasync explode(data: ExplodeData): Promise<void> {\\n    for (const pos of data.positions) {\\n        const col = Math.floor(pos / Game_Define.ROW);\\n        const row = pos % Game_Define.ROW;\\n        const cell = this.m_columns[col]?.GetSingleCell(row);\\n\\n        if (cell && cell.ThisNode) {\\n            // 從物件池取得特效 Prefab\\n            const fx = PrefabPoolManager.getInstance().get(\\\"ExplodeFX\\\");\\n            fx.setWorldPosition(cell.ThisNode.worldPosition);\\n            fx.parent = this.effectLayer;\\n\\n            // 播放完後回收\\n            this.scheduleOnce(() => {\\n                PrefabPoolManager.getInstance().put(\\\"ExplodeFX\\\", fx);\\n            }, 0.5);\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    await this.delay(0.5); // 等待特效播放完\\n}\\n```\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 加入補位音效\\n\\n在子類別中覆寫 `fill` 方法：\\n\\n```typescript\\nasync fill(data: FillData): Promise<void> {\\n    // 先執行原本的補位動畫（含存活下沉 + 新符號掉入 + 陣列重排）\\n    await super.fill(data);\\n\\n    // 播放落地音效\\n    AudioManager.Play(\\\"Symbol_Drop\\\");\\n}\\n```\\n\\n> ⚠️ 若你需要更細的控制（例如「存活下沉時播一個音、新符號掉入時播另一個」），\\n> 建議覆寫 `fillColumn` 而非 `fill`，並保留三階段流程（存活下沉 → 新符號掉入 → `RearrangeSingleCells`）。\\n> 跳過第三階段會讓 `m_singleCells` 索引與視覺位置失準，下一輪 explode 會錯位。\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 設定伺服器資料\\n\\n實際連接後端時，在收到 SpinAck 後設定 combo 資料：\\n\\n```typescript\\n// 在 GameView.OnRecvSpinAck() 中\\npublic OnRecvSpinAck(ack: ISpinAck): void {\\n    // ... 其他處理 ...\\n\\n    // 若為 Cascade/Tumble 模式，解析多階段資料\\n    if (this.m_slotReels.CurrentSpinMode !== SpinMode.Standard) {\\n        const { explodeList, fillList } = this.parseComboData(ack);\\n        this.SetComboData(explodeList, fillList);\\n    }\\n}\\n\\n// 資料轉換（依你的 protocol 格式調整）\\nprivate parseComboData(ack: ISpinAck) {\\n    const explodeList: ExplodeData[] = [];\\n    const fillList: FillData[] = [];\\n\\n    const roundInfo = ack.RoundQueue[this.CurPlateIndex];\\n    // 假設 protocol 有 ComboStageData 或 PlateQueue\\n    for (const stage of roundInfo.PlateQueue) {\\n        explodeList.push({ positions: stage.EliminatePos });\\n        fillList.push({ fillSymbols: stage.FillSymbols });\\n    }\\n\\n    // 最後加一個空消除（結束循環的信號）\\n    explodeList.push({ positions: [] });\\n\\n    return { explodeList, fillList };\\n}\\n```\\n\\n---\\n\\n## EffectStartState 分流邏輯\\n\\n目前 `EffectStartState` 中有自動注入 mock 資料的邏輯（開發用）。正式上線時改為：\\n\\n```typescript\\n// EffectStartState.OnEnter() 中\\nconst spinMode = this.m_gameView.SlotReels?.CurrentSpinMode ?? SpinMode.Standard;\\nif (spinMode !== SpinMode.Standard) {\\n    // 正式版：資料已在 OnRecvSpinAck 中設定好\\n    stateManager.NextState(Game_Define.GameState.EXPLODE);\\n    return;\\n}\\n```\\n\\n移除 `ResetComboData()` 和 `SetMockCascadeData()` 的呼叫即可。\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 檔案結構\\n\\n```\\nassets/Script/\\n├── FillStrategy/\\n│   ├── IFillStrategy.ts            # 介面 + SpinMode 枚舉 + 資料型別\\n│   ├── CascadeFillStrategy.ts      # 天降補位策略\\n│   └── TumbleFillStrategy.ts       # 雪崩補位策略\\n├── GameState/\\n│   ├── EffectStartState.ts         # 停輪後分流（Standard vs Cascade/Tumble）\\n│   ├── ExplodeState.ts             # 消除狀態\\n│   └── MatchingPatchUpState.ts     # 補位狀態\\n├── SlotReels.ts                    # 轉輪主類別（SetSpinMode / Explode / Fill）\\n├── GameView.ts                     # combo 資料管理（SetComboData / AdvanceComboIndex）\\n├── Game_Define.ts                  # EXPLODE / MATCHING_PATCH_UP 狀態枚舉\\n└── ReelDevTool.ts                  # 開發測試工具\\n```\\n\\n---\\n\\n## DevTool 測試（Console 指令）\\n\\n```javascript\\n// 取得 DevTool\\nlet dt = cc.find(\\\"節點路徑\\\").getComponent(\\\"ReelDevTool\\\");\\n\\n// 切換模式\\ndt.SetupCascadeMode();    // Cascade\\ndt.SetupTumbleMode();     // Tumble\\ndt.SetupStandardMode();   // Standard\\n\\n// 驗證狀態機流程（純 Log）\\ndt.TestCascadeFlow();\\ndt.TestTumbleFlow();\\n\\n// 手動測試消除/補位\\ndt.TestExplode([0, 1, 2]);\\ndt.TestCascadeFill([[3, 4, 5], [], [], [], []]);\\n\\n// 印出狀態\\ndt.PrintReelStatus();\\ndt.PrintCurrentPlate();\\n```\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 常見問題\\n\\n### Q: 如何讓不同列有不同的掉落延遲？\\nA: 在子類別的 `fillColumn` 中加入列間延遲：\\n```typescript\\nfor (let col = 0; col < this.m_columns.length; col++) {\\n    await this.delay(col * 0.05); // 每列延遲 0.05 秒\\n    await this.fillColumn(col, ...);\\n}\\n```\\n\\n### Q: 如何加入 NearWin 聽牌效果？\\nA: NearWin 是 Standard Spin 停輪階段的功能，在 `SlotReels.SetReelTimes()` 中處理，與 FillStrategy 無關。\\n\\n### Q: Cascade 和 Tumble 的差異在哪？\\nA: 邏輯結構相同（都是「存活下沉 + 新符號補位 + 陣列重排」三階段），差異在動畫表現：\\n- Cascade：掉落時間與「實際格數」成正比，每格時間獨立 — 適合中獎線消除\\n- Tumble：掉落時間「除以總行數」，整列同時抵達 — 適合全盤消除（Ways）\\n\\n### Q: 為什麼 Cascade 的 explode 階段要排序 deadRows？\\nA: 因為 `fill` 階段要用 `deadRows[i]` 對應到「視覺上第 i 個頂部空位」，必須由小到大排列，否則新符號會被放到錯誤的載體 cell，重排後索引就亂了。\\n\\n### Q: 多階段 cascade 中為什麼第二次消除拿到的盤面是對的？\\nA: 第一次 `fillColumn` 結尾呼叫 `RearrangeSingleCells(mapping)` 重排了 `m_singleCells` 與 `m_symbols`，讓 `m_singleCells[r]` 確實對應到視覺上 row r 的 cell。第二次 explode 用 `HideSymbolByRow(row)` 隱藏的 cell 因此與視覺一致。\\n\\n### Q: 如何加入乘倍累加（Tumble 常見）？\\nA: 在 `ExplodeState` 或 `MatchingPatchUpState` 中處理：\\n```typescript\\n// ExplodeState.OnEnter() 中\\nthis.m_gameView.CurrentMultiplier += explodeData.positions.length;\\n```\\n\",\"numLines\":334,\"startLine\":1,\"totalLines\":334}}"</outcome>

概覽\\n\\n本系統支援三種老虎機轉輪玩法，透過策略模式切換：\\n\\n| SpinMode | 說明 | 狀態機流程 |\\n|----------|------|-----------|\\n| `Standard` | 標準轉輪，停輪後直接報獎 | SPIN → EFFECT_START → AWARD |\\n| `Cascade` | 停輪後消除中獎符號，上方符號天降補位，循環直到無消除 | SPIN → EFFECT_START → [EXPLODE ↔ MATCHING_PATCH_UP]* → AWARD |\\n| `Tumble` | 與 Cascade 類似，掉落速度更快，通常搭配乘倍累加 | 同 Cascade |\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 快速開始\\n\\n### 設定 Cascade 模式\\n\\n```typescript\\nimport { SpinMode } from \\\"./FillStrategy/IFillStrategy\\\";\\nimport { CascadeFillStrategy } from \\\"./FillStrategy/CascadeFillStrategy\\\";\\n\\n// 在 GameView 初始化時\\nthis.m_slotReels.SetSpinMode(SpinMode.Cascade, new CascadeFillStrategy());\\n```\\n\\n### 設定 Tumble 模式\\n\\n```typescript\\nimport { TumbleFillStrategy } from \\\"./FillStrategy/TumbleFillStrategy\\\";\\n\\nthis.m_slotReels.SetSpinMode(SpinMode.Tumble, new TumbleFillStrategy());\\n```\\n\\n### 切回 Standard 模式\\n\\n```typescript\\nthis.m_slotReels.SetSpinMode(SpinMode.Standard);\\n```\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 調整掉落速度\\n\\n透過 constructor 參數自訂：\\n\\n```typescript\\n// CascadeFillStrategy 參數\\nnew CascadeFillStrategy({\\n    dropTimePerCell: 0.1,    // 每格掉落時間（秒），越小越快。預設 0.1\\n    bounceHeight: 12,        // 落地回彈高度（px）。預設 12\\n    bounceTime: 0.05,        // 回彈動畫時間（秒）。預設 0.05\\n    explodeTime: 0.3,        // 消除動畫等待時間（秒）。預設 0.3\\n})\\n\\n// TumbleFillStrategy 參數\\nnew TumbleFillStrategy({\\n    baseDropTime: 0.3,       // 基礎掉落時間（秒）。預設 0.3\\n    bounceHeight: 12,        // 落地回彈高度（px）。預設 12\\n    bounceUpTime: 0.05,      // 回彈上升時間（秒）。預設 0.05\\n    bounceDownTime: 0.033,   // 回彈下降時間（秒）。預設 0.033\\n    explodeTime: 0.4,        // 消除動畫等待時間（秒）。預設 0.4\\n})\\n```\\n\\n### 速度計算公式\\n\\n- **Cascade**：掉落時間 = `dropTimePerCell × 掉落格數`\\n- **Tumble**：掉落時間 = `baseDropTime × 掉落格數 / 總行數`\\n\\n---\\n\\n## CascadeFillStrategy 內部三階段流程\\n\\n`fillColumn(col, column, fillSymbols)` 對單列執行的步驟：\\n\\n1. **存活下沉**：把未被消除的符號（aliveRows）視覺上 tween 到 `newCount + i` 的新位置，把空位推到頂部。\\n2. **新符號掉入**：借用 `deadRows[i]` 索引的（被消除、目前隱藏的）cell 當作載體 — 直接 `cell.ChangeSymbol()` 換 sprite + 從畫面外 tween 落到 `getFixedNode(col, i).position`。\\n3. **重排索引**：tween 完成後呼叫 `column.RearrangeSingleCells(mapping)`，把 `m_singleCells` 與 `m_symbols` 陣列索引對齊視覺位置（例如原本在 row 0 的存活 cell，視覺上移到了 row 2，重排後就成為 `m_singleCells[2]`）。\\n\\n### 為什麼要重排？\\n\\n- 存活 cell 視覺上「沉降」是用 tween 移動節點，但 `m_singleCells[r]` 是用陣列索引綁定的\\n- 若不重排，下一輪 explode 拿到 `m_singleCells[r]` 會跟視覺對不上，導致消除錯位\\n- 重排只動陣列順序，**不會碰 sprite、座標或 active 狀態**\\n\\n### 與 ColumnSymbol 的耦合\\n\\n實作依賴 `ColumnSymbol` 提供：\\n- `NodeCount` — 該列可見行數（每列不一定相同）\\n- `GetSingleCell(row)`、`GetSymbolAt(row)`、`SetSymbolAt(row, id)` — cell 存取\\n- `RearrangeSingleCells(mapping)` — 重排陣列索引\\n\\n座標系完全使用 `getFixedNode(col, row)`（由 `SlotReels` 在 `SetSpinMode` 時注入），不再依賴 `ColumnSymbol.CalPosY`，因為後者用對稱中心算的座標與場景上手動擺放的固定節點對不上。\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 加入消除動畫\\n\\n### 方式一：調整等待時間（最簡單）\\n\\n只需加大 `explodeTime`，在外部（如 EffectStartState）播放特效：\\n\\n```typescript\\nnew CascadeFillStrategy({ explodeTime: 0.8 }) // 給更多時間播放特效\\n```\\n\\n### 方式二：覆寫 explode 方法（推薦）\\n\\n建立子類別，在消除時播放 Spine 或粒子特效：\\n\\n```typescript\\nimport { CascadeFillStrategy } from \\\"./FillStrategy/CascadeFillStrategy\\\";\\nimport { ExplodeData } from \\\"./FillStrategy/IFillStrategy\\\";\\n\\nexport class MyGameFillStrategy extends CascadeFillStrategy {\\n\\n    // 覆寫消除方法\\n    async explode(data: ExplodeData): Promise<void> {\\n        const promises: Promise<void>[] = [];\\n\\n        for (const pos of data.positions) {\\n            const col = Math.floor(pos / Game_Define.ROW);\\n            const row = pos % Game_Define.ROW;\\n            const cell = this.m_columns[col]?.GetSingleCell(row);\\n\\n            if (cell && cell.ThisNode) {\\n                // 播放消除特效（依你的遊戲需求）\\n                promises.push(this.playExplodeEffect(cell.ThisNode));\\n            }\\n        }\\n\\n        await Promise.all(promises);\\n    }\\n\\n    private playExplodeEffect(node: Node): Promise<void> {\\n        return new Promise(resolve => {\\n            // 範例：縮放消失動畫\\n            tween(node)\\n                .to(0.2, { scale: v3(1.3, 1.3, 1) })\\n                .to(0.1, { scale: v3(0, 0, 1) })\\n                .call(() => resolve())\\n                .start();\\n        });\\n    }\\n}\\n```\\n\\n使用：\\n```typescript\\nthis.m_slotReels.SetSpinMode(SpinMode.Cascade, new MyGameFillStrategy());\\n```\\n\\n### 方式三：搭配 PrefabPoolManager（進階）\\n\\n```typescript\\nasync explode(data: ExplodeData): Promise<void> {\\n    for (const pos of data.positions) {\\n        const col = Math.floor(pos / Game_Define.ROW);\\n        const row = pos % Game_Define.ROW;\\n        const cell = this.m_columns[col]?.GetSingleCell(row);\\n\\n        if (cell && cell.ThisNode) {\\n            // 從物件池取得特效 Prefab\\n            const fx = PrefabPoolManager.getInstance().get(\\\"ExplodeFX\\\");\\n            fx.setWorldPosition(cell.ThisNode.worldPosition);\\n            fx.parent = this.effectLayer;\\n\\n            // 播放完後回收\\n            this.scheduleOnce(() => {\\n                PrefabPoolManager.getInstance().put(\\\"ExplodeFX\\\", fx);\\n            }, 0.5);\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    await this.delay(0.5); // 等待特效播放完\\n}\\n```\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 加入補位音效\\n\\n在子類別中覆寫 `fill` 方法：\\n\\n```typescript\\nasync fill(data: FillData): Promise<void> {\\n    // 先執行原本的補位動畫（含存活下沉 + 新符號掉入 + 陣列重排）\\n    await super.fill(data);\\n\\n    // 播放落地音效\\n    AudioManager.Play(\\\"Symbol_Drop\\\");\\n}\\n```\\n\\n> ⚠️ 若你需要更細的控制（例如「存活下沉時播一個音、新符號掉入時播另一個」），\\n> 建議覆寫 `fillColumn` 而非 `fill`，並保留三階段流程（存活下沉 → 新符號掉入 → `RearrangeSingleCells`）。\\n> 跳過第三階段會讓 `m_singleCells` 索引與視覺位置失準，下一輪 explode 會錯位。\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 設定伺服器資料\\n\\n實際連接後端時，在收到 SpinAck 後設定 combo 資料：\\n\\n```typescript\\n// 在 GameView.OnRecvSpinAck() 中\\npublic OnRecvSpinAck(ack: ISpinAck): void {\\n    // ... 其他處理 ...\\n\\n    // 若為 Cascade/Tumble 模式，解析多階段資料\\n    if (this.m_slotReels.CurrentSpinMode !== SpinMode.Standard) {\\n        const { explodeList, fillList } = this.parseComboData(ack);\\n        this.SetComboData(explodeList, fillList);\\n    }\\n}\\n\\n// 資料轉換（依你的 protocol 格式調整）\\nprivate parseComboData(ack: ISpinAck) {\\n    const explodeList: ExplodeData[] = [];\\n    const fillList: FillData[] = [];\\n\\n    const roundInfo = ack.RoundQueue[this.CurPlateIndex];\\n    // 假設 protocol 有 ComboStageData 或 PlateQueue\\n    for (const stage of roundInfo.PlateQueue) {\\n        explodeList.push({ positions: stage.EliminatePos });\\n        fillList.push({ fillSymbols: stage.FillSymbols });\\n    }\\n\\n    // 最後加一個空消除（結束循環的信號）\\n    explodeList.push({ positions: [] });\\n\\n    return { explodeList, fillList };\\n}\\n```\\n\\n---\\n\\n## EffectStartState 分流邏輯\\n\\n目前 `EffectStartState` 中有自動注入 mock 資料的邏輯（開發用）。正式上線時改為：\\n\\n```typescript\\n// EffectStartState.OnEnter() 中\\nconst spinMode = this.m_gameView.SlotReels?.CurrentSpinMode ?? SpinMode.Standard;\\nif (spinMode !== SpinMode.Standard) {\\n    // 正式版：資料已在 OnRecvSpinAck 中設定好\\n    stateManager.NextState(Game_Define.GameState.EXPLODE);\\n    return;\\n}\\n```\\n\\n移除 `ResetComboData()` 和 `SetMockCascadeData()` 的呼叫即可。\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 檔案結構\\n\\n```\\nassets/Script/\\n├── FillStrategy/\\n│   ├── IFillStrategy.ts            # 介面 + SpinMode 枚舉 + 資料型別\\n│   ├── CascadeFillStrategy.ts      # 天降補位策略\\n│   └── TumbleFillStrategy.ts       # 雪崩補位策略\\n├── GameState/\\n│   ├── EffectStartState.ts         # 停輪後分流（Standard vs Cascade/Tumble）\\n│   ├── ExplodeState.ts             # 消除狀態\\n│   └── MatchingPatchUpState.ts     # 補位狀態\\n├── SlotReels.ts                    # 轉輪主類別（SetSpinMode / Explode / Fill）\\n├── GameView.ts                     # combo 資料管理（SetComboData / AdvanceComboIndex）\\n├── Game_Define.ts                  # EXPLODE / MATCHING_PATCH_UP 狀態枚舉\\n└── ReelDevTool.ts                  # 開發測試工具\\n```\\n\\n---\\n\\n## DevTool 測試（Console 指令）\\n\\n```javascript\\n// 取得 DevTool\\nlet dt = cc.find(\\\"節點路徑\\\").getComponent(\\\"ReelDevTool\\\");\\n\\n// 切換模式\\ndt.SetupCascadeMode();    // Cascade\\ndt.SetupTumbleMode();     // Tumble\\ndt.SetupStandardMode();   // Standard\\n\\n// 驗證狀態機流程（純 Log）\\ndt.TestCascadeFlow();\\ndt.TestTumbleFlow();\\n\\n// 手動測試消除/補位\\ndt.TestExplode([0, 1, 2]);\\ndt.TestCascadeFill([[3, 4, 5], [], [], [], []]);\\n\\n// 印出狀態\\ndt.PrintReelStatus();\\ndt.PrintCurrentPlate();\\n```\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 常見問題\\n\\n### Q: 如何讓不同列有不同的掉落延遲？\\nA: 在子類別的 `fillColumn` 中加入列間延遲：\\n```typescript\\nfor (let col = 0; col < this.m_columns.length; col++) {\\n    await this.delay(col * 0.05); // 每列延遲 0.05 秒\\n    await this.fillColumn(col, ...);\\n}\\n```\\n\\n### Q: 如何加入 NearWin 聽牌效果？\\nA: NearWin 是 Standard Spin 停輪階段的功能，在 `SlotReels.SetReelTimes()` 中處理，與 FillStrategy 無關。\\n\\n### Q: Cascade 和 Tumble 的差異在哪？\\nA: 邏輯結構相同（都是「存活下沉 + 新符號補位 + 陣列重排」三階段），差異在動畫表現：\\n- Cascade：掉落時間與「實際格數」成正比，每格時間獨立 — 適合中獎線消除\\n- Tumble：掉落時間「除以總行數」，整列同時抵達 — 適合全盤消除（Ways）\\n\\n### Q: 為什麼 Cascade 的 explode 階段要排序 deadRows？\\nA: 因為 `fill` 階段要用 `deadRows[i]` 對應到「視覺上第 i 個頂部空位」，必須由小到大排列，否則新符號會被放到錯誤的載體 cell，重排後索引就亂了。\\n\\n### Q: 多階段 cascade 中為什麼第二次消除拿到的盤面是對的？\\nA: 第一次 `fillColumn` 結尾呼叫 `RearrangeSingleCells(mapping)` 重排了 `m_singleCells` 與 `m_symbols`，讓 `m_singleCells[r]` 確實對應到視覺上 row r 的 cell。第二次 explode 用 `HideSymbolByRow(row)` 隱藏的 cell 因此與視覺一致。\\n\\n### Q: 如何加入乘倍累加（Tumble 常見）？\\nA: 在 `ExplodeState` 或 `MatchingPatchUpState` 中處理：\\n```typescript\\n// ExplodeState.OnEnter() 中\\nthis.m_gameView.CurrentMultiplier += explodeData.positions.length;\\n```\\n\",\"numLines\":334,\"startLine\":1,\"totalLines\":334}}"</outcome>

  <outcome>"{\"type\":\"text\",\"file\":{\"filePath\":\"G:\\\\Cocos_Project\\\\uk_917_leprechauns_pots_client\\\\tests\\\\FallInstructions.test.ts\",\"content\":\"/**\\n * @ch computeFallInstructions 純函式單元測試（無 cc 依賴）\\n * @description 驗證設計規格 P1 的 BC-1/BC-2/BC-3 與 EH-1。\\n *   執行：npx ts-node --transpile-only tests/FallInstructions.test.ts\\n */\\nimport * as assert from \\\"node:assert\\\";\\nimport { ComputeFallInstructions } from \\\"../assets/Script/FillStrategy/FallInstructions\\\";\\n\\nlet passed = 0;\\nfunction test(name: string, fn: () => void): void {\\n    fn();\\n    passed++;\\n    console.log(`  ✅ ${name}`);\\n}\\n\\n// BC-1：典型輸入 — visibleCount=4, deadRows=[1,2], fillCount=2\\ntest(\\\"BC-1 典型輸入產出正確指令\\\", () => {\\n    const r = ComputeFallInstructions([1, 2], 4, 2);\\n    assert.strictEqual(r.newCount, 2);\\n    // 存活 row=[0,3]；row0→toRow2(dist2)收錄；row3→toRow3(dist0)略過\\n    assert.deepStrictEqual(r.aliveMoves, [{ fromRow: 0, toRow: 2, dropDistance: 2 }]);\\n    assert.deepStrictEqual(r.newDrops, [\\n        { carrierRow: 1, targetRow: 0, dropSteps: 3 },\\n        { carrierRow: 2, targetRow: 1, dropSteps: 2 },\\n    ]);\\n    // [載體 dead rows] + [存活 rows] + [未填補 dead rows]\\n    assert.deepStrictEqual(r.rearrangeMapping, [1, 2, 0, 3]);\\n});\\n\\n// BC-2：fillCount > deadRows.length → newCount = deadRows.length（多餘補位不填）\\ntest(\\\"BC-2 多餘補位不填\\\", () => {\\n    const r = ComputeFallInstructions([1], 4, 3);\\n    assert.strictEqual(r.newCount, 1); // 非 3\\n    assert.deepStrictEqual(r.aliveMoves, [{ fromRow: 0, toRow: 1, dropDistance: 1 }]);\\n    assert.deepStrictEqual(r.newDrops, [{ carrierRow: 1, targetRow: 0, dropSteps: 2 }]);\\n    assert.deepStrictEqual(r.rearrangeMapping, [1, 0, 2, 3]);\\n});\\n\\n// BC-3：dropDistance<=0 的存活符號不收錄為 aliveMove\\ntest(\\\"BC-3 dropDistance<=0 不收錄\\\", () => {\",\"numLines\":40,\"startLine\":1,\"totalLines\":56}}"</outcome>
</observed_from_primary_session>

  <outcome>"{\"type\":\"text\",\"file\":{\"filePath\":\"G:\\\\Cocos_Project\\\\uk_917_leprechauns_pots_client\\\\tests\\\\FallInstructions.test.ts\",\"content\":\"/**\\n * @ch computeFallInstructions 純函式單元測試（無 cc 依賴）\\n * @description 驗證設計規格 P1 的 BC-1/BC-2/BC-3 與 EH-1。\\n *   執行：npx ts-node --transpile-only tests/FallInstructions.test.ts\\n */\\nimport * as assert from \\\"node:assert\\\";\\nimport { ComputeFallInstructions } from \\\"../assets/Script/FillStrategy/FallInstructions\\\";\\n\\nlet passed = 0;\\nfunction test(name: string, fn: () => void): void {\\n    fn();\\n    passed++;\\n    console.log(`  ✅ ${name}`);\\n}\\n\\n// BC-1：典型輸入 — visibleCount=4, deadRows=[1,2], fillCount=2\\ntest(\\\"BC-1 典型輸入產出正確指令\\\", () => {\\n    const r = ComputeFallInstructions([1, 2], 4, 2);\\n    assert.strictEqual(r.newCount, 2);\\n    // 存活 row=[0,3]；row0→toRow2(dist2)收錄；row3→toRow3(dist0)略過\\n    assert.deepStrictEqual(r.aliveMoves, [{ fromRow: 0, toRow: 2, dropDistance: 2 }]);\\n    assert.deepStrictEqual(r.newDrops, [\\n        { carrierRow: 1, targetRow: 0, dropSteps: 3 },\\n        { carrierRow: 2, targetRow: 1, dropSteps: 2 },\\n    ]);\\n    // [載體 dead rows] + [存活 rows] + [未填補 dead rows]\\n    assert.deepStrictEqual(r.rearrangeMapping, [1, 2, 0, 3]);\\n});\\n\\n// BC-2：fillCount > deadRows.length → newCount = deadRows.length（多餘補位不填）\\ntest(\\\"BC-2 多餘補位不填\\\", () => {\\n    const r = ComputeFallInstructions([1], 4, 3);\\n    assert.strictEqual(r.newCount, 1); // 非 3\\n    assert.deepStrictEqual(r.aliveMoves, [{ fromRow: 0, toRow: 1, dropDistance: 1 }]);\\n    assert.deepStrictEqual(r.newDrops, [{ carrierRow: 1, targetRow: 0, dropSteps: 2 }]);\\n    assert.deepStrictEqual(r.rearrangeMapping, [1, 0, 2, 3]);\\n});\\n\\n// BC-3：dropDistance<=0 的存活符號不收錄為 aliveMove\\ntest(\\\"BC-3 dropDistance<=0 不收錄\\\", () => {\",\"numLines\":40,\"startLine\":1,\"totalLines\":56}}"</outcome>

content:
<observed_from_primary_session>
  <what_happened>Write</what_happened>
  <occurred_at>2026-07-13T11:29:56.029Z</occurred_at>
  <working_directory>G:\Cocos_Project\uk_917_leprechauns_pots_client</working_directory>
  <parameters>"{\"file_path\":\"G:\\\\Cocos_Project\\\\uk_917_leprechauns_pots_client\\\\CLAUDE.md\",\"content\":\"# CLAUDE.md\\n\\nThis file provides guidance to Claude Code (claude.ai/code) when working with code in this repository.\\n\\n## Project Overview\\n\\n`uk_917_leprechauns_pots_client` is a **Cocos Creator 3.6.2** client for a UK-market online slot machine game (\\\"Leprechaun's Pots\\\"), built from the company's internal `uk_slot_template`. Game logic lives in `assets/Script/`; presentation/business primitives (bottom bar, autoplay, buy-bonus, jackpot, messaging, networking) come from the proprietary **astarte-framework** editor extension, imported via the `db://astarte-framework/...` virtual path.\\n\\n## Setup / Environment\\n\\nThis repo does not vendor the framework or protocol — they're pulled in separately:\\n\\n1. Copy `gameSetting.json` to the project root (already present) and set the Proto repo's git URL/branch in it.\\n2. Run `Tools_SlotSetUP/FirstClone.bat` (or `FirstClone_py3.bat`) to clone `extensions/` (astarte-framework, etc.) and the proto sources.\\n3. Run `Tools_SlotSetUP/Update.bat` to pull updates later.\\n4. `extensions/` is itself a separate git repository (`slotExtensions-client`) nested inside this one — do not edit files under `extensions/astarte-framework` as if they were project code; framework fixes belong upstream. See \\\"Framework vs. game code\\\" below.\\n\\nThere is no CLI build/lint/test pipeline — this project is developed and built through the **Cocos Creator 3.6.2 Editor** (Project > Build). `library/`, `temp/`, `local/`, `profiles/`, `settings/` are editor-managed caches; never hand-edit them.\\n\\n## Tests\\n\\nOnly plain-function unit tests exist, run directly with ts-node (no test runner/config):\\n\\n```\\nnpx ts-node --transpile-only tests/FallInstructions.test.ts\\n```\\n\\nAdd new pure-logic tests (no `cc` engine dependency) alongside this one in `tests/`, using `node:assert` and the same `test(name, fn)` pattern.\\n\\n## Architecture\\n\\n### State machine (core game flow)\\n\\n`GameView.ts` is the top-level `Component` and orchestrator. In `SetStateMachine()` it registers one state instance per enum value from `Game_Define.GameState` (plus shared `CommonState` values like `IDLE`/`SPIN`/`WAIT_RES` from astarte-framework) into `stateManager` (astarte-framework singleton), and drives it via `stateManager.Tick(dt)` in `update()`. Each state lives in `assets/Script/GameState/*.ts` and takes the `GameView` instance in its constructor to reach shared game state.\\n\\nRepresentative flow: `WAIT_READY → PLATE_SHOW → IDLE → SPIN → EFFECT_START → [EXPLODE ↔ MATCHING_PATCH_UP]* → AWARD → ROUND_SHOW_END → ROUND_END → (ENTER_FREE/CHECK_JP/SCATTER_SHOW/ADD_FREE/LEAVE_FREE as applicable)`. `GameView.ForEndToNext()` decides whether round-end goes to another free-game spin or back to `IDLE`.\\n\\nTo add a new state: add an enum entry to `GAMEVIEW_STATE` in `Game_Define.ts`, create the state class in `GameState/`, and register it in `GameView.SetStateMachine()`.\\n\\n### Reel / fill strategy (Standard vs Cascade vs Tumble)\\n\\n`SlotReels.ts` (`SlotReel` component) owns the reel columns (`ColumnSymbol` → `SingleCell`) and delegates post-stop presentation to a pluggable `IFillStrategy` (`FillStrategy/`), selected via `SetSpinMode(SpinMode.Standard | Cascade | Tumble, strategy)`:\\n\\n- **Standard**: stop → award directly.\\n- **Cascade**/**Tumble**: stop → repeated `EXPLODE ↔ MATCHING_PATCH_UP` cycles (remove winning symbols, drop-fill from above) → award. Cascade drops per-cell (line-win games); Tumble drops per-column in sync (full-board/Ways games).\\n\\nFill strategies implement a fixed three-phase `fillColumn`: alive-symbols sink → new symbols drop in (via reused \\\"dead\\\" cells) → `ColumnSymbol.RearrangeSingleCells()` re-syncs the cell array to the new visual order. Skipping the rearrange step desyncs the next explode pass. See `assets/Script/FillStrategy/使用說明.md` for the full guide, constructor tuning options, and DevTool console commands (`ReelDevTool`).\\n\\nBoard layout (row/column counts, visible vs. buffered symbol counts per layout mode) is data-driven via `ReelLayoutConfig.ts` → `REEL_LAYOUT_PRESETS.standard` (3-layer scrolling reel) / `.dropEntry` (1-layer, symbols drop in) — set once via `SlotReel.SetLayoutConfig()` before `CreateSymbol()`.\\n\\n### Symbols\\n\\n`Game_Define.ts` is the central config: the `Symbol` enum (WILD, paytable letters/majors, CASH/JP tiers, SCATTER variants, FEATURE symbols), board dimensions (`COL`/`ROW`), the `FEATURES` flag map (which game mechanics are enabled), NearWin/Scatter tuning tables, and misc timing constants. Symbol sprites are loaded dynamically by filename convention `Symbol_XX` from the game bundle (`GameView.LoadSymbol`).\\n\\n### Networking / protocol\\n\\n`Proto.ts` re-exports a generated protobufjs module from `assets/Script/Test/ar2lpProto.js` (despite the `Test` folder name, this is the live protocol used at runtime — not a test fixture). `GameView.OnCommand()` is the `ConnectionManager` callback that decodes incoming buffers (`info`, `spin`/`lastSpin`, `unshow`) into typed `ar2lpProto.*` messages. `RecoverSpinAck.ts` normalizes/converts raw server plate data for the reel components.\\n\\n`Game_Define.USE_MOCK_SERVER = true` makes `GameView.GenerateMockSpinAck()` fabricate spin results locally instead of talking to a real backend — check this flag before assuming network behavior in dev builds.\\n\\n### Presentation layers\\n\\n- `EffectPlate/` — board win presentation (win frames, symbol spine animations) — see `EffectPlate.ts`, `EffectSpine.ts`, `SymbolSpine.ts`.\\n- `Spine/` — reusable spine playback helpers (`BaseSpine`, `InLoopOutSpine`).\\n- `FreeGame/` — free-game enter/exit declaration presentation.\\n- `Audio/AudioManager.ts` — sound/BGM playback (see its own `使用說明.md`).\\n- `Common/` — generic helpers (node pooling, tweened numbers/sprites, roulette rotation, async utils).\\n\\n### Framework vs. game code\\n\\nAnything imported from `db://astarte-framework/...` (managers like `newBottombarManager`, `newExtraManager`, `msgBoxManager`, `stateManager`, `commonGameManager`, `eventManager`, `ConnectionManager`, shared `Define`/`CommonState`/`tools`) is shared, cross-project framework code living in the separately-versioned `extensions/astarte-framework` repo. Game-specific code under `assets/Script/` should consume that framework's public API, not modify it in place.\\n\"}"</parameters>

Game logic lives in `assets/Script/`; presentation/business primitives (bottom bar, autoplay, buy-bonus, jackpot, messaging, networking) come from the proprietary **astarte-framework** editor extension, imported via the `db://astarte-framework/...` virtual path.\\n\\n## Setup / Environment\\n\\nThis repo does not vendor the framework or protocol — they're pulled in separately:\\n\\n1. Run `Tools_SlotSetUP/FirstClone.bat` (or `FirstClone_py3.bat`) to clone `extensions/` (astarte-framework, etc.) and the proto sources.\\n3. Run `Tools_SlotSetUP/Update.bat` to pull updates later.\\n4. `extensions/` is itself a separate git repository (`slotExtensions-client`) nested inside this one — do not edit files under `extensions/astarte-framework` as if they were project code; framework fixes belong upstream. See \\\"Framework vs. game code\\\" below.\\n\\nThere is no CLI build/lint/test pipeline — this project is developed and built through the **Cocos Creator 3.6.2 Editor** (Project > Build). `library/`, `temp/`, `local/`, `profiles/`, `settings/` are editor-managed caches; never hand-edit them.\\n\\n## Tests\\n\\nOnly plain-function unit tests exist, run directly with ts-node (no test runner/config):\\n\\n```\\nnpx ts-node --transpile-only tests/FallInstructions.test.ts\\n```\\n\\nAdd new pure-logic tests (no `cc` engine dependency) alongside this one in `tests/`, using `node:assert` and the same `test(name, fn)` pattern.\\n\\n## Architecture\\n\\n### State machine (core game flow)\\n\\n`GameView.ts` is the top-level `Component` and orchestrator. In `SetStateMachine()` it registers one state instance per enum value from `Game_Define.GameState` (plus shared `CommonState` values like `IDLE`/`SPIN`/`WAIT_RES` from astarte-framework) into `stateManager` (astarte-framework singleton), and drives it via `stateManager.Tick(dt)` in `update()`. Each state lives in `assets/Script/GameState/*.ts` and takes the `GameView` instance in its constructor to reach shared game state.\\n\\nRepresentative flow: `WAIT_READY → PLATE_SHOW → IDLE → SPIN → EFFECT_START → [EXPLODE ↔ MATCHING_PATCH_UP]* → AWARD → ROUND_SHOW_END → ROUND_END → (ENTER_FREE/CHECK_JP/SCATTER_SHOW/ADD_FREE/LEAVE_FREE as applicable)`. `GameView.ForEndToNext()` decides whether round-end goes to another free-game spin or back to `IDLE`.\\n\\nTo add a new state: add an enum entry to `GAMEVIEW_STATE` in `Game_Define.ts`, create the state class in `GameState/`, and register it in `GameView.SetStateMachine()`.\\n\\n### Reel / fill strategy (Standard vs Cascade vs Tumble)\\n\\n`SlotReels.ts` (`SlotReel` component) owns the reel columns (`ColumnSymbol` → `SingleCell`) and delegates post-stop presentation to a pluggable `IFillStrategy` (`FillStrategy/`), selected via `SetSpinMode(SpinMode.Standard | Cascade | Tumble, strategy)`:\\n\\n- **Standard**: stop → award directly.\\n- **Cascade**/**Tumble**: stop → repeated `EXPLODE ↔ MATCHING_PATCH_UP` cycles (remove winning symbols, drop-fill from above) → award. Cascade drops per-cell (line-win games); Tumble drops per-column in sync (full-board/Ways games).\\n\\nFill strategies implement a fixed three-phase `fillColumn`: alive-symbols sink → new symbols drop in (via reused \\\"dead\\\" cells) → `ColumnSymbol.RearrangeSingleCells()` re-syncs the cell array to the new visual order. Skipping the rearrange step desyncs the next explode pass. Symbol sprites are loaded dynamically by filename convention `Symbol_XX` from the game bundle (`GameView.LoadSymbol`).\\n\\n### Networking / protocol\\n\\n`Proto.ts` re-exports a generated protobufjs module from `assets/Script/Test/ar2lpProto.js` (despite the `Test` folder name, this is the live protocol used at runtime — not a test fixture). `GameView.OnCommand()` is the `ConnectionManager` callback that decodes incoming buffers (`info`, `spin`/`lastSpin`, `unshow`) into typed `ar2lpProto.*` messages. `RecoverSpinAck.ts` normalizes/converts raw server plate data for the reel components.\\n\\n`Game_Define.USE_MOCK_SERVER = true` makes `GameView.GenerateMockSpinAck()` fabricate spin results locally instead of talking to a real backend — check this flag before assuming network behavior in dev builds.\\n\\n### Presentation layers\\n\\n- `EffectPlate/` — board win presentation (win frames, symbol spine animations) — see `EffectPlate.ts`, `EffectSpine.ts`, `SymbolSpine.ts`.\\n- `Spine/` — reusable spine playback helpers (`BaseSpine`, `InLoopOutSpine`).\\n- `FreeGame/` — free-game enter/exit declaration presentation.\\n- `Audio/AudioManager.ts` — sound/BGM playback (see its own `使用說明.md`).\\n- `Common/` — generic helpers (node pooling, tweened numbers/sprites, roulette rotation, async utils).\\n\\n### Framework vs. game code\\n\\nAnything imported from `db://astarte-framework/...` (managers like `newBottombarManager`, `newExtraManager`, `msgBoxManager`, `stateManager`, `commonGameManager`, `eventManager`, `ConnectionManager`, shared `Define`/`CommonState`/`tools`) is shared, cross-project framework code living in the separately-versioned `extensions/astarte-framework` repo.
